title: mariscus albus
intro: Mariscus albus, also known as white club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Mariscus albus include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Mariscus albus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
